tagline: Dust yourself off before the brooms arrive.
liner: Step into a black-and-white tower where greed turns cleaning tools against their owners. This frantic track blends gritty 90s boom bap breaks with dramatic strings and ominous bassoons to create a Halloween noir atmosphere that feels raw yet dangerously playful. As water rises and stars fill the eyes of innocent mice, an old spell goes awry, flooding the room in a cartoonish horror show. The music marches forward like an unstoppable army, capturing the slippery inevitability of losing control over one's own creation.
worldCaption: A noir tower flooded with broomstick soldiers chasing gold under a moon that has turned blue for good reason.

bios.lead: Sings raspy verses while ignoring every warning given by fate itself.
bios.back: Whispers crazy secrets about the spell before it consumed them all.
bios.drums: Keeps time with frantic beats until panic sets in completely now.
bios.perc: Marches on broomsticks like a terrifying army of cleaning tools today.
bios.bass: Grooves low and heavy to shake the tower floorboards right down.
bios.synth: Weaves dark textures that bend moonlight into shadows all around here.
bios.other: Adds gritty grit to make every shadow look hungry for more now.
bios.woodwinds: Howls with bassoon riffs while oboes scream in cartoon horror tonight.
bios.brass: Brings dramatic strings and brass hits to raise the panic levels high.
